summary: School Detail Page Visual Refactor Testing Complete - Editorial/minimal style successfully implemented. All visual requirements verified on Marshall University (on board, match score 79) and Alfred State College (not on board).

issues: Teal color #1a8a80 found in sidebar/navigation area (outside School Detail page scope) - not a blocker for this refactor

critical_code_review_comments: All visual requirements met - editorial/minimal style implemented correctly
Hero: Large title (text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-[3.5rem] font-light) - VERIFIED
Match ring uses ochre #8B3F1F (not teal) - VERIFIED
CTAs are underline style (border-bottom: 1.5px solid #8B3F1F) - VERIFIED
No heavy cards/containers (no rounded-2xl, shadow-lg, shadow-md) - VERIFIED
Why This School: narrative paragraph + label-aligned bullets (min-w-[110px]) - VERIFIED
Next step: italic inline text - VERIFIED
Quick Snapshot: clean text grid with micro labels (Accessible, Good, Strong, etc.) - VERIFIED
Coaching Staff: simple inline list (no avatar circles) - VERIFIED
Subtle dividers (h-px, opacity-30) - VERIFIED (5 dividers found)
All data still present (tuition, acceptance, students, graduation, retention, etc.) - VERIFIED
Add to Pipeline button works - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Detail Page visual refactor complete. Editorial/minimal style with flowing content layout. All heavy cards removed, ochre accent #8B3F1F used throughout, underline-style CTAs, label-aligned Why This School bullets, italic next step, clean Quick Snapshot grid with micro labels, simple inline coaching staff list, subtle h-px dividers with opacity-30, generous mb-20 whitespace between sections.

quick_snapshot.micro_interpretation_labels: PASS - Accessible, Good, Strong, Average, Mid-size, Open admission found

color_scheme.no_teal_in_school_detail: PASS - Teal only in sidebar (outside scope)
